meaning: adj.乡下的,田园的,乡村风味的,生活在农村的
examples: It was a delightful rural scene.
He has a romantic view of rural society.
Agriculture forms the backbone of the rural economy.
Pakistan is an agrarian economy and has rural population largely dependent on natural resources.
Protected areas play an important role in conserving the biodiversity and thus sustaining rural livelihoods.
